calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alicia Gamez, via ZOOM, counsel for Suzanne Eder, Petitioner.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 20, 2002, is admitted to probate. Suzanne Eder is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 09, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To May-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
